title: polygala vulgaris var. collina
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. collina, also known as the common or bastard milkwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris var. collina include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Polygala vulgaris var. collina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and expectorants.
